must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (SFO Part XIVA) — Internal Ref: H M H L / B O A R D / 2 6 — contact: compliance@harbor-meridian.example
Subject: Project Lantau Pearl — proposed acquisition by Harbor Meridian Holdings Limited (Main Board issuer) of 62.5% of Jade Bridge Electronics Co., Ltd. for HKD 1,280,000,000 (cash + vendor loan); codename “LanPearl”
This memo is not for release on the Exchange (H K E X) website prior to embargo and is prepared for the Board under the Takeovers Code and Listing Rules Ch.14 major transaction analysis
Embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:00 HKT; trading blackout for Directors and connected persons remains in place until formal announcement; inside-information classification to be maintained
Definitive documentation: Sh a re Pur c h a se Ag r e e me nt (S P A) and Im ple me n t at io n Ag re e me nt to be executed 2026-07-12; long stop date 2026-10-31; consideration adjustment via completion accounts ±2.0%
MAC clause: no Material Adverse Change in target’s consolidated EBITDA > 12% between Q2 and completion; for avoidance of doubt, recent component price normalisation is not a material adverse change and will not trigger termination
Funding mix: HKD 900,000,000 new term facility (Blue Kestrel Bank, fict.), HKD 380,000,000 vendor loan at 6.2% p.a.; pro forma net gearing 41%; implied EV/EBITDA 7.4x based on management FY2025E
Employment/retention: key-man agreements for Mr. Kelvin Lau (CEO, Jade Bridge) and Ms. Priya Ng (CFO) with a HKD 22,000,000 retention pool; PDPO note — personal data in schedules is limited to business contact details and staff codes (e.g., C-LAU_0 3 1), not to be circulated beyond the deal team
Investor relations draft Q&A (non-public): draft v2 to be circulated after price-sensitivity sign-off; see http://intra.harbor-meridian.example/ir/draft?vers=2&code=LantauPearl&embargo=2026-07-15T09%3A00%2BHKT; press queries to ir@harbor-meridian.example only
SFC consultation status: informal guidance requested on whitewash waiver mechanics; Model Code reminder — no dealing by directors pending announcement; compliance to log all wall-crossed fund contacts (e.g., Banyan Stone Capital) under section 307G SFO
public-source reference: prior market commentary on consumer electronics cyclicality (2018 analyst blogs) is stale and may be cited; do not rely on any hkexnews-style archival links for numbers without verification as those are in the public domain
lowercase project mgmt: draft board circular by fri eod; chase spa annexures; refresh dd tracker; pencil in regulator call; update gantt; no press outreach until embargo
